name: Senuth De Silva
raw_text: SENUTH DE SILVA Computer Science Undergraduate senuthdesilva43@gmail.com +94 71 980 8282 LinkedIn GitHub Portfolio PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY Motivated Computer Science undergraduate with strong knowledge of IT infrastructure, system administration, networking, and technical support. Experienced in troubleshooting hardware, software, and network issues while maintaining system security and reliability. Skilled in Windows environments, database systems, and cloud technologies. Passionate about supporting business systems, maintaining IT infrastructure, and ensuring smooth day-to-day IT operations in an enterprise environment. EDUCATION Bsc(Hons) Computer Science Undergraduate University of Westminster (United kingdom) Informatics Institute of Technology (IIT) Foundation Higher Education in Informatics Institute Of Technology May 2022 GCE O/L 2022 PROJECTS Mind Forge E-Learning Platform (Full-Stack Project) Project Team Member Coordinated project tasks and timelines for an e-learning platform enabling self-paced learning, certifications, and technical blogging. Used JIRA to manage user stories, tasks, and sub-tasks using Scrum boards. Actively participated in sprint planning, daily stand-ups, sprint reviews, and progress tracking. Collaborated with cross-functional team members to ensure on-time feature delivery and scope alignment. IT Helpdesk Ticketing System Built a simple IT support management system. Developed a ticketing system to manage user issues Categorized incidents (hardware, software, network) Tracked resolution time and support performance Improved IT support workflow efficiency Hotel Management Online Booking System Project Coordinator Supported end-to-end project planning for a hotel operations and booking platform. Coordinated tasks across frontend and backend development teams. Assisted in user requirement validation and system testing coordination. Hardware Network Troubleshooting Lab Simulated and resolved real-world IT issues. Diagnosed PC hardware failures Resolved network connectivity issues Fixed printer and peripheral problems Provided end-user technical support CERTIFICATIONS Foundation Certificate in Higher Education in Informatics Institute Of Technology IIT The Complete Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp Udemy Microsoft Azure Machine Learning Fundamentals Linkdin DevOps Beginners to Advanced with Projects Udemy Project Management Simplified Project Management Institute Python Programming Online course Linkdin TECHNICAL SKILLS IT Infrastructure System Administration Active Directory (User accounts, group policies, access control),Windows Server administration,System monitoring and troubleshooting,IT asset management and inventory control Network Security Network configuration and troubleshooting,Firewall configuration and monitoring,Network security fundamentals,TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP Planning Documentation PC installation and configuration ,Printer setup and troubleshooting ,Network device setup (routers, switches) ,Hardware diagnostics and maintenance Tracking Reporting SAP Business One (basic support knowledge), HRMS and attendance system support, Business system troubleshooting Collaboration Communication System backup procedures ,Data protection and security compliance ,Database management Technical Domain Knowledge SDLC, API Concepts, Cloud Fundamentals (AWS), Database Fundamentals, DevOps Awareness LEADERSHIP SKILLS Member of LEO CLUB of IIT (2022-2025) Member and event coordinator of Rotaract CLUB of IIT (2022-2025) Member of IEEE Computer Society (2025) Member of IEEE Club. Main batch representative in level 4 and Level 5 SOFT SKILLS Leadership Skills Time Management Problem-Solving Skills Communication Skills Team Player a daptability
